GENERAL.DEVICE:eth0
GENERAL.TYPE:ethernet
GENERAL.STATE:100 (connected)
IP4.ADDRESS[1]:192.168.1.100/24
IP4.GATEWAY:192.168.1.1
DHCP4.OPTION[1]:dhcp_server_identifier = 192.168.1.1
DHCP4.OPTION[2]:routers = 192.168.1.1
DHCP4.OPTION[3]:domain_name_servers = 192.168.1.1 8.8.8.8
DHCP4.OPTION[4]:dhcp_lease_time = 86400
DHCP4.OPTION[5]:subnet_mask = 255.255.255.0
DHCP4.OPTION[6]:domain_name = home.local

GENERAL.DEVICE:wlan0
GENERAL.TYPE:wifi
GENERAL.STATE:30 (disconnected)

GENERAL.DEVICE:lo
GENERAL.TYPE:loopback
GENERAL.STATE:10 (unmanaged)
